_comment: Copy this file to ~/.claude/data/app-reviews/products.json and edit. Each top-level key (other than '_comment') is the canonical product name (also used as DB product_key). 'aliases' is a list of alternative names, matched case-insensitively. They can be in any language since this file is private. Either 'play' or 'ios' may be omitted if the product is not on that platform.
